steps.title: Identify the key transition
steps.content: The key signal is “inaccessible until”—the data shifted from being inaccessible to their opposite state through a project.

steps.title: Match that transition
steps.content:
Available works in context: once the data were transferred and became available, the researcher could use them, matching the follow-up sentence.

The other three don't fit this scenario: predictable and representative address unrelated properties, while complicated contradicts what a data-transfer project accomplishes.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
